title: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.
comment: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.
terms: Step 2: Update the Position and Correction Alphas using the Position/Correction curve set for each Mantle.

title: Step 3: Lerp multiple transforms together for independent control over the horizontal and vertical blend to the animated start position, as well as the target position.
comment: Step 3: Lerp multiple transforms together for independent control over the horizontal and vertical blend to the animated start position, as well as the target position.

title: Initial Blend In (controlled in the timeline curve) to allow the actor to blend into the Position/Correction curve at the midoint. This prevents pops when mantling an object lower than the animated mantle.
comment: Initial Blend In (controlled in the timeline curve) to allow the actor to blend into the Position/Correction curve at the midoint. This prevents pops when mantling an object lower than the animated mantle.

title: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.
comment: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend from the currently blending transforms into the final mantle target using the X value of the Position/Correction Curve.

title: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.
comment: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend into the animated horizontal and rotation offset using the Y value of the Position/Correction Curve.

title: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.
comment: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.
terms: Blend into the animated vertical offset using the Z value of the Position/Correction Curve.

title:
Set Actor Location and Rotation(Update Target)
La destinazione è ALS Base Character BP
terms:
Set Actor Location and Rotation(Update Target)
La destinazione è ALS Base Character BP

title: Step 1: Continually update the mantle target from the stored local transform to follow along with moving objects.
comment: Step 1: Continually update the mantle target from the stored local transform to follow along with moving objects.
terms: Step 1: Continually update the mantle target from the stored local transform to follow along with moving objects.

title: Step 4: Set the actors location and rotation to the Lerped Target.
comment: Step 4: Set the actors location and rotation to the Lerped Target.
terms: Step 4: Set the actors location and rotation to the Lerped Target.
